message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0

class WordFinder {
    + fileCreator()
    + replaceInString()
}

class String {
    + revised
    + content
    + file
    + str
    + replaceAll()
}

class PrintWriter {
    + out
    + writer
    + close()
    + println()
}

class Files {
    + readString
}

class Scanner {
    + input
    + nextLine()
}

WordFinder --|> String
WordFinder --|> PrintWriter
WordFinder --|> Files
WordFinder --|> Scanner

note top of WordFinder as "A"
note top of String as "C"
note top of PrintWriter as "C"
note top of Files as "C"
note top of Scanner as "C"

@enduml
